mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id, c.ticket_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.comment_type, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark, u.nick_name AS user_name FROM ticket_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = c.user_id WHERE c.del_flag = '0' AND c.ticket_id = #{ticketId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
